name: InspectAgents
description: AI agent testing and safety platform. Search documented AI chatbot failures, assess deployment risk, get the 67-point testing checklist, and submit incident reports. A free AI agent safety resource.
instructions: Use InspectAgents when users ask about AI chatbot failures, AI agent testing, prompt injection prevention, hallucination detection, AI deployment safety, or AI risk assessment. search_failures finds real incidents, get_failure gets full details, assess_risk evaluates deployment readiness, get_checklist returns the 67-point safety checklist, submit_feedback reports new incidents. All tools are free with no authentication.

tools.name: search_failures
tools.description: Search and filter the AI failures database by category, severity, year, or free text

query.description: Free-text search across title, company, description, impact

tools.name: get_failure
tools.description: Get full details of a single AI failure by ID

tools.name: assess_risk
tools.description: Run the AI risk assessment quiz programmatically and get personalized recommendations

tools.name: get_checklist
tools.description: Retrieve the 67-point AI Agent Risk Checklist, optionally filtered by severity or section

query.description: Free-text search across item names and descriptions

tools.name: submit_feedback
tools.description: Submit feedback, corrections, or new AI incident reports

resources.description: MCP Apps-compatible HTML overview of InspectAgents tools and recommended use cases
